name: omni-impact-review
description: Pull the impact + risk + references + advisory bundle for a symbol before editing it. The recommended pre-edit ritual.
when_to_use: Before any non-trivial edit on an existing symbol — answers 'who depends on this' (graph + line-level), 'what diagnostics already exist on the file', and 'are there past lessons I should remember'.
safety_notes: Read-only flow — no step writes to disk.
omni_memory advisory is a recall, not a record.
If omni_impact returns risk='unknown' / confidence='low', re-confirm the symbol via omni_search(mode='symbol') before treating any of the bundle as actionable.

inputs.name: symbol
inputs.description: The symbol you're about to modify (function/class/method name).

inputs.name: file
inputs.description: Optional file path for context-aware diagnostics + advisory.

inputs.name: task
inputs.description: One-line task description used as the memory advisory query.

steps.title: Check graph, references, and diagnostics readiness
steps.purpose: Read the live capability registry before selecting graph/LSP providers. If graph is degraded, the review must explicitly use deterministic references and test-candidate fallback.

failure_policy.notes: Impact provider selection is unsafe without a live capability snapshot.

steps.title: Start graph bootstrap when full impact evidence is required
steps.purpose: Optional background bootstrap. Do not block deterministic symbol/reference fallback while the graph job is running.

failure_policy.notes: Proceed with text/indexed references and report graph capability missing.

steps.title: Get callers, callees, risk badge, suggested tests
steps.purpose: Map the blast radius and surface tests that should re-run after the change. impact.v2 returns suggested_tests and suggested_commands when the call graph knows about the symbol; treat suggested_commands as ready-to-run pytest invocations.
post_step_guidance: If suggested_tests is non-empty, prefer running suggested_commands over a full pytest sweep.
If suggested_tests is empty AND risk != 'unknown', mark coverage_gap=true and consider the omni-test-coverage recipe.
If risk='unknown' with confidence='low', the symbol is not in the call graph — re-verify via omni_search(mode='symbol') before continuing.

failure_policy.notes: A missing graph must degrade to deterministic references/test candidates; abort only when the symbol cannot be resolved.

steps.title: Find line-level references (callsites, fixtures, string mentions)
steps.purpose: omni_impact returns graph-level callers/callees. Use omni_search(mode='references') for line-level and textual references — including tests, fixtures, string-literal mentions, dynamic dispatch sites, and anything the static call graph misses. Each row is tagged with source/confidence so AI editors can rank confidence.

failure_policy.notes: References is best-effort; a missing references list narrows but does not block the review.

steps.title: Surface any current errors in the target file
steps.purpose: Distinguish pre-existing problems from regressions caused by the upcoming change. Re-run after any edit to compare.

failure_policy.notes: If a file isn't provided this step is skipped, not failed.

steps.title: Recall historical lessons about this symbol
steps.purpose: memory.v2 advisory bundles structured action_items + risks + referenced_memories from past mistakes / solutions / architecture decisions on this symbol/file/task. Read action_items BEFORE drafting any edit.

failure_policy.notes: Memory is advisory — a missing recall doesn't block the review, just leaves it weaker.

success_criteria: omni_impact returns source/confidence and a non-empty risk assessment (or risk='unknown' with an explicit re-confirm step recorded)
omni_search(mode='references') has been checked for line-level references (or skipped because no symbol was provided)
suggested_tests and suggested_commands are recorded when omni_impact returned them
memory_advisory action_items have been reviewed (or noted as empty)
next_actions: Start with omni_status(detail='compact') and inspect impact.graph plus language-server capabilities
If full graph evidence is required and impact.graph is not ready, run omni_index(action='bootstrap', scope='graph', background=true, format='json')
Then run omni_impact(symbol='${symbol}', depth=2, format='json') for graph or deterministic fallback evidence
Then omni_search(query='${symbol}', mode='references', format='json') for line-level callsites
Run omni_memory(action='advisory', symbol='${symbol}', task='${task}', format='json') to surface prior lessons
If you'll edit the symbol next, hand off to the omni-safe-refactor recipe
